title: Column projection on struct does not work with view
description:
### What happens?

Column projection on struct columns works ok when reading parquet file directly but does not work when using a view.

### To Reproduce


**With view:**
```sql
copy (select { f1: 1::int, f2: 1::int } as c1) to 'test.parquet';

create or replace view test as
select *
from 'test.parquet';

explain analyse 
select c1.f1
from test;
```

**Profile:**

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_struct (c1 Nested(f1 Int32, f2 Int32));
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW test_view AS SELECT * FROM test_struct;
SELECT c1.f2 FROM test_struct WHERE c1.f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Column projection on struct fails with view
